intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/4. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 100%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/4. 10:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 10:00 at 95-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 26% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 26% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 25 minutes of threshold work done. Block 2/4. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 10min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 82-90 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/4. 10:00 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2: 100% for 10:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/4. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 35min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 35 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 53% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 25 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 40 minutes in. 100% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 53% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 53% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 66% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 66% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 10:00 at 100%. Then 10min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 95-100% FTP, 95-105 rpm. After this: 10min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 10:00 at 100%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 10min to contemplate your life choices. 100% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 100% × 10:00. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 86% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 86% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 86% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
